channel.title: Features on Mgmt Config
channel.description: Recent content in Features on Mgmt Config

item.title: Real-time modelling
item.description: ??? Mgmt runs in real-time, by using our clever domain specific language called mcl. Mcl efficiently compiles once, and then runs continuously, only making changes when it detects that a state change has occured.

item.title: Fast
item.description: Mgmt is so incredibly fast, because it’s well-written in Golang and algorithmically more clever than traditional tools. Written in Golang for speed! XXX Faster than python, ruby, etc Algorithmically clever XXX Tracks state etc

item.title: Reactive
item.description: Mgmt’s resources efficiently monitor their desired state, to ensure you’re constantly converged, and so that we can avoid unnecessary, resource-wasting polling.

item.title: Distributed
item.description: Mgmt can run as a distributed system, so there’s no single-point-of-failure, and you can avoid the hassle of managing a central automation server.
